speakers.name: Dave (guest speaker)
speakers.background: MIT '64; former house tutor in Tom's fraternity; later VP at Honeywell, CEO of two large chemical companies, president of fibers division of Allied Signal; retired, sits on corporate boards

themes: great expectations / overselling of new materials
intellectual property failure (Chad Graham / U Penn)
MIT TLO conflict of interest (John Preston)
Epstein / Joi Ito Media Lab scandal (contemporaneous)
additive manufacturing critique (eyeglass hinges, vapor deposition rate)
contemporaneous_context: Recorded September 11, 2019, four days after Joi Ito's resignation from MIT Media Lab over Epstein ties (Sept 7, 2019). Tom references this scandal directly in p32–p33 and uses it as a frame for the Molten Metal Technologies / TLO scandal of the 1990s.
